---
title: "PULSE Annual Workshop"
author: "PULSE TCDC"
date: today
---

### Welcome!

::: {.callout-tip}
### Info
The next PULSE Annual Workshop is schedule for **March 10-13, 2026** in Uppsala, Sweden. 

Please note the program is currently under development!
:::

## Workshop Sessions
The 2026 PULSE workshop will include sessions on:

- Beyond the Bench: Impact of Science on Society & Policy
- Ethics for Future Leaders
- Science culture: Bias, Inclusivity, and Equality in Research
- Entrepreneurial Mindset 101: Pitch a project

As well as a scientific program to discuss research and foster interactions between group leaders, postdocs, and others.
